Bash(unzip -p "src/tools/contract-generator/BBNT_NGUYỄN_VĂN_AN.docx" word/document.xml 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys; from xml.dom.minidom import parseString; print\(parseString\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\).toprettyxml\(indent='  '\)\)" 2>/dev/null | head -300)

Bash(unzip -p "src/tools/contract-generator/HopDong_NGUYỄN_VĂN_AN.docx" word/document.xml 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys
content = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Extract just the text content
import re
# Remove XML tags but keep text
text = re.sub\(r'<w:br[^/]*/>', '\\n', content\)
text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', text\)
text = re.sub\(r'\\n{3,}', '\\n\\n', text\)
print\(text[:8000]\)
")
